---
title: "Weekly Journal Entry"
subtitle: "Week 1: Course Introduction"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
params:
  week: 1
  chapters: "None (syllabus week)"
  approach: "connector"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## Journal Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Week** | 1 |
| **Reading** | Syllabus and course website |
| **Approach** | Connector / Troubleshooter / Critic (choose one) |

---

## Instructions

Reflect on your first week. Write 250-300 words using one of three approaches:

- **The Connector**: Link something from this week to your interests, goals, or prior experience
- **The Troubleshooter**: Document a setup challenge you faced and how you resolved it
- **The Critic**: What assumptions does this course seem to make? Do you agree with them?

Delete the two approaches you are NOT using. Write your reflection below.

---

## My Reflection

[Write 250-300 words here]

---

**Push to GitHub** after writing, then submit the rendered PDF to Blackboard.
